What We Do

Complete Electrical Services

From a single outlet to a full commercial build-out, we handle it all — safely, on time, and on budget.

Most Popular

Residential Installations

Full wiring, panel upgrades, outlets, switches, and lighting for homes of every size.

Commercial Electrical

Office build-outs, retail fit-ups, warehouses, and industrial facilities — done to code.

New

Solar & Renewable Energy

Solar panel installation, battery storage, and grid-tie systems. Cut your energy bill today.

Maintenance & Repairs

Fast diagnosis and repair of any electrical issue. We restore power safely and quickly.

Inspection & Certification

Comprehensive electrical inspections with detailed reports. Perfect for real estate transactions.

24 / 7

Emergency 24/7 Service

Electrical emergencies don't keep office hours — and neither do we. We respond in under 1 hour.

Why Choose Us

The Fly Electric Difference

Licensed & Insured

Every technician holds a current Texas state electrical license and full liability coverage. Your property is protected.

Houston Local

Born and based in Houston, TX. We know the codes, the neighborhoods, and the community we serve.

24/7 Emergency

Power out at 2 AM? We'll be there. Our emergency line never goes to voicemail — a real electrician answers.
